# SmartCalc — Full Site Documentation for AI Systems

> Free online calculators for finance, health, and productivity. No login required. Fully client-side.

SmartCalc (https://dailysmartcalc.com) is a free web application offering 25+ browser-based calculators. All calculations run entirely in your browser — no data is sent to any server. The site is organized into three main categories: Finance, Health, and Productivity.

---

## Finance Calculators

### Mortgage Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/mortgage
Calculates monthly mortgage payment including principal, interest, property taxes, homeowner's insurance, HOA fees, and PMI. Shows full amortization schedule. Uses standard amortization formula: M = P[r(1+r)^n] / [(1+r)^n – 1].

**FAQ:**
- What is PMI? Private Mortgage Insurance is required when your down payment is less than 20%. It typically costs 0.5%–1% of the loan amount annually.
- What's included in a monthly mortgage payment? Principal, interest, property taxes, homeowner's insurance, HOA (if applicable), and PMI (if applicable) — often called PITI.
- How does loan term affect total interest? A 15-year mortgage has higher monthly payments but significantly less total interest than a 30-year mortgage.

### Investment Return Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/investment
Projects investment growth with compound interest and regular monthly contributions. Visualizes growth over time. Formula: FV = PV(1+r)^t + PMT × [((1+r)^t – 1) / r].

### Auto Loan Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/loan
Estimates monthly car payment with loan amount, interest rate, term, trade-in value, and down payment.

### Retirement Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/retirement
Determines retirement readiness based on current age, savings, monthly contributions, expected returns, and planned retirement age. Uses the 4% safe withdrawal rate rule.

### Debt Payoff Planner
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/debt-payoff
Compares debt snowball (smallest balance first) vs debt avalanche (highest interest first) strategies. Shows months to payoff and total interest for each method.

### Time to Millionaire Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/time-to-millionaire
Calculates how many years until your investments reach $1,000,000 based on current savings, monthly contributions, and expected annual return.

### Rent vs Buy Analyzer
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/rent-vs-buy
Compares total 5-year cost of renting vs buying a home, including mortgage payments, property taxes, maintenance, insurance, opportunity cost of down payment, and rent increases.

### FIRE Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/fire
Calculates your Financial Independence, Retire Early (FIRE) number and timeline. Uses the 25x annual expenses rule and factors in current savings, income, and savings rate.

### Freelance Rate Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/freelance-rate
Determines the hourly rate a freelancer needs to charge based on desired annual income, business expenses, taxes, billable hours, and vacation time.

### ROI / ROAS Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/roi
Calculates Return on Investment: ROI = (Gain – Cost) / Cost × 100%. Also shows Return on Ad Spend for marketing campaigns.

### Savings Goal Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/savings-goal
Determines how much you need to save monthly to reach a financial goal by a target date, accounting for compound interest.

### Emergency Fund Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/finance/emergency
Calculates the recommended emergency fund size based on monthly expenses, job stability, number of income sources, and dependents. Standard recommendation: 3–6 months of expenses.

---

## Health Calculators

### BMI Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/health/bmi
Calculates Body Mass Index: BMI = weight(kg) / height(m)². Categories: Underweight (<18.5), Normal (18.5–24.9), Overweight (25–29.9), Obese (30+). Note: BMI doesn't distinguish between muscle and fat mass.

### Calorie Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/health/calories
Estimates daily calorie needs using the Mifflin-St Jeor equation. Factors: age, sex, height, weight, activity level. Shows maintenance, deficit (–500), and surplus (+300) targets.

### Macro Split Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/health/macro-split
Calculates daily protein, carbohydrate, and fat targets in grams based on calorie goal and diet type (balanced, keto, high-protein, low-fat).

### Heart Rate Zone Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/health/heart-rate
Calculates five training heart rate zones using the Karvonen formula: Target HR = ((Max HR – Resting HR) × %Intensity) + Resting HR. Max HR = 220 – age.

### Sleep Cycle Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/health/sleep
Recommends optimal bedtimes and wake-up times based on 90-minute sleep cycles. Accounts for the average 15-minute sleep onset latency. Adults need 5–6 complete cycles (7.5–9 hours).

### One Rep Max Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/health/1rm
Estimates one-repetition maximum from submaximal lifts using multiple formulas: Epley (weight × (1 + reps/30)), Brzycki, Lombardi, and O'Conner.

---

## Productivity Tools

### Pomodoro Timer
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/productivity/pomodoro
A 25-minute focused work timer followed by 5-minute breaks (Pomodoro Technique). After 4 cycles, take a 15–30 minute long break.

### Salary ↔ Hourly Converter
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/productivity/salary-hourly
Converts between annual salary and hourly wage. Default: 2,080 work hours/year (40 hrs/week × 52 weeks). Adjustable for part-time.

### Meeting Cost Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/productivity/meeting-cost
Calculates the real-time cost of a meeting based on number of attendees and their average hourly rates. Shows per-minute and total meeting cost.

### Percentage Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/productivity/percentage
All percentage operations: "What is X% of Y?", "X is what % of Y?", and "% change from X to Y".

### GPA Calculator
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/productivity/gpa
Calculates semester and cumulative GPA from course grades and credit hours. Uses standard 4.0 scale (A=4.0, B=3.0, etc.).

### Typing Speed Test
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/productivity/typing-speed
Measures words per minute (WPM) and accuracy. Uses random English passages. WPM = (characters typed / 5) / minutes elapsed.

---

## Blog Posts

### The Math Behind Financial Independence (FIRE)
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/financial-independence-fire-math
Complete guide to calculating your FIRE number, savings rate, and timeline to financial independence.

URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/emergency-fund-guide
How to calculate the right emergency fund size and where to keep it.

URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/sleep-productivity-science
Scientific evidence connecting sleep quality to work performance and cognitive function.

URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/hidden-costs-buying-home-2026
Beyond the mortgage: closing costs, property taxes, maintenance, insurance, and opportunity costs.

### Compound Interest vs. The Inflation Monster
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/compound-interest-inflation-monster
How compounding works and why inflation-adjusted returns matter for long-term investing.

URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/bmi-what-your-number-really-means
Limitations of BMI, when it's useful, and better alternatives for body composition assessment.

### Calories In vs Calories Out: The Weight Loss Equation
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/calories-in-calories-out-guide
Evidence-based guide to energy balance for weight management.

### Debt Snowball vs Debt Avalanche
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/debt-snowball-vs-avalanche
Side-by-side comparison of the two most popular debt repayment strategies.

### Renting vs Buying in 2026
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/renting-vs-buying-2026-analysis
Financial analysis comparing the total cost of renting versus buying in the current market.

### Zone 2 Training: Why the Best Athletes Train Slow
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/zone-2-training-heart-rate-guide
The science behind low-intensity training and how to calculate your Zone 2 heart rate.

### How Much Is "Enough"? The Retirement Number Nobody Talks About
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/retirement-number-how-much-is-enough
Why most retirement advice is wrong and how to calculate your actual number.

### 5 Car Loan Mistakes That Cost You Thousands
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/car-loan-mistakes-cost-thousands
Common auto loan traps and how to avoid overpaying for your vehicle.

### The Freelancer's Pricing Formula: Stop Charging Too Little
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/freelancer-pricing-formula
How to calculate a sustainable freelance rate that covers taxes, expenses, and profit.

### ROI on Everything: A Decision Framework for Life
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/roi-decision-framework-for-life
Applying return on investment thinking to career, education, and lifestyle decisions.

### The Math Behind Saving for Any Big Purchase
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/math-behind-saving-big-purchase
Step-by-step savings plan math for vacations, cars, homes, and other goals.

### Your Ideal Macro Split: Protein, Carbs & Fat Explained
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/ideal-macro-split-protein-carbs-fat
Evidence-based guide to calculating your optimal macronutrient ratios.

### Why Knowing Your One Rep Max Makes You Stronger
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/one-rep-max-strength-training-guide
How 1RM testing and percentage-based training improve results.

### The Pomodoro Technique: How 25 Minutes Changes Everything
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/pomodoro-technique-productivity-guide
The science of timeboxing and how the Pomodoro method boosts focus.

### Salary vs Hourly: Which Actually Pays More?
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/salary-vs-hourly-which-pays-more
Real math comparing salaried vs hourly compensation with overtime.

### That Meeting Could Have Been an Email: The Real Cost
URL: https://dailysmartcalc.com/blog/meeting-cost-calculator-guide
How to calculate and reduce the hidden cost of workplace meetings.

---

## Technical Details
- All calculations run client-side in the browser (React + TypeScript + Vite)
- No user data is collected or stored
- No login required
- Mobile responsive design
- Languages: English (default), Spanish
- SEO: JSON-LD structured data (WebSite, SoftwareApplication, Article, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList)
- Available at: https://dailysmartcalc.com
